text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, refers to the ability of machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. One key part of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data without being explicitly programmed for every step. A more advanced type is deep learning, which uses neural networks to process information in a way similar to the human brain. AI is already part of our daily lives. For instance, voice assistants like Siri and Alexa use AI to understand and respond to our questions. Recommendation systems on Netflix or YouTube also rely on AI to suggest content based on our preferences. From self-driving cars to virtual doctors, AI is changing how we work and play.
